# Build Env Contract Template

- canonical repo
- canonical workspace
- repo_attach_record_ref
- build_scope_ref
- Railway project or deploy target
- environment scope: preview / staging / production
- `DATABASE_URL`
- `BETTER_AUTH_SECRET`
- payment provider env
- analytics provider env
- email provider env
- error tracking env
- storage env
- jobs env
- optional `OPENROUTER_API_KEY` only if the venture ships LLM product features
- env owner
- last verification date
- rollback_path
- secret_values_must_not_be_written: true
